introSection: Spider-Man Doc Ock's Revenge is a steel spinning roller coaster at IMG Worlds of Adventure in Dubai, Dubai, United Arab Emirates. It is based on the Marvel character, Spider-Man. The ride also has an outdoor section. Spider-Man Doc Ock's Revenge is a clone of Sierra Sidewinder at Knott's Berry Farm.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 4 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 16 riders per train.

fullText:
Spider-Man Doc Ock's Revenge is a steel spinning roller coaster at IMG Worlds of Adventure in Dubai, Dubai, United Arab Emirates. It is based on the Marvel character, Spider-Man. The ride also has an outdoor section. Spider-Man Doc Ock's Revenge is a clone of Sierra Sidewinder at Knott's Berry Farm.



2 trains with 4 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 16 riders per train.
